title: Setup project
steps: Run `npm init -y && npm install csv-parse openai`
OpenAI SDK works with OpenRouter via base URL override

title: Load & filter CSV
description: Parse people.csv and filter for men aged 20-40 born in Grudziądz
steps: Columns: name, surname, gender, birthDate (YYYY-MM-DD), birthPlace, birthCountry, job

title: Tag jobs via LLM
description: Send each filtered person's job to OpenRouter LLM for tagging with structured output
steps: For each filtered person, send `job` to LLM
Use `response_format` with JSON schema enforcing `{ tags: string[] }`
Tag list: ["IT", "transport", "edukacja", "medycyna", "praca z ludźmi", "praca z pojazdami", "praca fizyczna"]
Tags is an ARRAY — one person can have multiple tags
Can batch: send multiple jobs per request

title: Filter for transport
description: Keep only records tagged with transport

title: Submit to hub
description: POST results to ag3nts verification endpoint
steps: Body: { apikey, task: "people", answer: [{ name, surname, gender: "M", born: <year>, city: "Grudziądz", tags: [...] }] }
Check: filtered count, tagged results, response with flag
